summary: Verified Checkout signup flow refactor: single Full Name input replaces First/Last, password removed from signup UI, auto-generated silently. All 7 test scenarios PASS.

test_results.signup_form_shape: PASS - passenger-fullname (1), passenger-email (1), phone input (1). passenger-firstname / passenger-lastname / passenger-password DO NOT EXIST.
test_results.signin_toggle: PASS - toggle-auth-mode switches to signin mode showing signin-email + signin-password (fullname/phone hidden).
test_results.single_name_TestOne: PASS - POST /api/proxy/auth/register body: firstName='TestOne', lastName='TestOne', password auto-gen 'Zx...!9' (18 chars), email+phoneNumber correct.
test_results.empty_fullname_validation: PASS - 'Requis' errors shown for fullName/email/phone; NO register request fired.
test_results.logged_in_regression: PASS - After signup, /checkout header switches to 'Logged in as {FullName}' banner (data-testid passenger-details section replaced by loggedAs banner). Signup form no longer shown.

critical_code_review_comments: Random password relies on window.crypto.getRandomValues — good. Password shape 'Zx' + base36(bytes).slice(0,14) + '!9' = 18 chars total, meets 16-20 char range.
splitFullName handles single/two/three+ word cases correctly and collapses multi-spaces via /\s+/g.

Minor: PhoneInput doesn't expose a data-testid='passenger-phone' on the inner <input>. Not a bug but the review_request mentioned it — consider adding data-testid to the PhoneInput inner input for testability.
test_credentials: None required — signup uses freshly generated emails.
seed_data_creation: sessionStorage.zont_booking seeded with fake searchData+selectedCar to reach /checkout directly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: To reach /checkout as guest: set sessionStorage 'zont_booking' with {searchData:{pickup,dropoff,date:YYYY-MM-DD,time:HH:MM,pickupCoords,dropoffCoords},selectedCar:{price,imagePath,tripType,...},_ts:Date.now()} then navigate. Submit button is disabled until Stripe cardComplete — use form.requestSubmit() via JS to bypass for validation/register-payload testing (register fires BEFORE Stripe setup-intent). Register endpoint used: /api/proxy/auth/register.
